name: fill_and_comm
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> B \<and> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show "B \<and> A"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_and_elim_left
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show A
    sorry
qed

name: fill_imp_refl
script:
lemma "A \<longrightarrow> A"
proof
  assume a: A
  show A
    sorry
qed

name: fill_imp_trans
script:
lemma "(A \<longrightarrow> B) \<longrightarrow> (B \<longrightarrow> C) \<longrightarrow> A \<longrightarrow> C"
proof
  assume ab: "A \<longrightarrow> B"
  show "(B \<longrightarrow> C) \<longrightarrow> A \<longrightarrow> C"
  proof
    assume bc: "B \<longrightarrow> C"
    show "A \<longrightarrow> C"
    proof
      assume a: A
      show C
        sorry
    qed
  qed
qed

name: fill_de_morgan
script:
lemma "\<not> A \<and> \<not> B \<longrightarrow> \<not> (A \<or> B)"
proof
  assume h: "\<not> A \<and> \<not> B"
  show "\<not> (A \<or> B)"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_contrapositive
script:
lemma "(A \<longrightarrow> B) \<longrightarrow> \<not> B \<longrightarrow> \<not> A"
proof
  assume ab: "A \<longrightarrow> B"
  show "\<not> B \<longrightarrow> \<not> A"
  proof
    assume nb: "\<not> B"
    show "\<not> A"
      sorry
  qed
qed

name: fill_ex_intro
script:
lemma "P a \<longrightarrow> (\<exists>x. P x)"
proof
  assume h: "P a"
  show "\<exists>x. P x"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_all_elim
script:
lemma "(\<forall>x. P x) \<longrightarrow> P a"
proof
  assume h: "\<forall>x. P x"
  show "P a"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_iff_intro
script:
lemma "(A \<longrightarrow> B) \<longrightarrow> (B \<longrightarrow> A) \<longrightarrow> (A \<longleftrightarrow> B)"
proof
  assume ab: "A \<longrightarrow> B"
  show "(B \<longrightarrow> A) \<longrightarrow> (A \<longleftrightarrow> B)"
  proof
    assume ba: "B \<longrightarrow> A"
    show "A \<longleftrightarrow> B"
      sorry
  qed
qed

name: fill_distrib_and_or
script:
lemma "A \<and> (B \<or> C) \<longrightarrow> (A \<and> B) \<or> (A \<and> C)"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> (B \<or> C)"
  obtain a disj where a: A and disj: "B \<or> C" using h by auto
  show "(A \<and> B) \<or> (A \<and> C)"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_rev_rev
script:
lemma "rev (rev xs) = xs"
  sorry

name: fill_length_append
script:
lemma "length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys"
  sorry

name: fill_map_append
script:
lemma "map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys"
  sorry

name: fill_filter_append
script:
lemma "filter P (xs @ ys) = filter P xs @ filter P ys"
  sorry

name: fill_set_append
script:
lemma "set (xs @ ys) = set xs \<union> set ys"
  sorry

name: fill_rev_append
script:
lemma "rev (xs @ ys) = rev ys @ rev xs"
  sorry

name: fill_map_map
script:
lemma "map f (map g xs) = map (f \<circ> g) xs"
  sorry

name: fill_foldr_append
script:
lemma "foldr f (xs @ ys) z = foldr f xs (foldr f ys z)"
  sorry

name: fill_drop_length_append
script:
lemma "drop (length xs) (xs @ ys) = ys"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_add_comm
script:
lemma "(m::nat) + n = n + m"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_mul_comm
script:
lemma "(m::nat) * n = n * m"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_pow_add
script:
lemma "(m::nat) ^ (n + p) = m ^ n * m ^ p"
  sorry

name: fill_isar_map_id
script:
lemma "map id xs = xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_length_replicate
script:
lemma "length (replicate n x) = n"
proof (induction n)
  case 0
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Suc n)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_rev_snoc
script:
lemma "rev (xs @ [x]) = x # rev xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_foldl_append
script:
lemma "foldl f z (xs @ ys) = foldl f (foldl f z xs) ys"
proof (induction xs arbitrary: z)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed
